spec_match.rationale: Excellent spec fidelity. Accurately maps requestStorageAccessFor, RWS manifest systems, and CHIPS partitioned cookie mechanics.

interactive.rationale: Superbly interactive. Implements step tab toggles, use-case checkboxes, code comparison switcher buttons, and 3 distinct live API test controllers that update results with clear formatting and error logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent index description perfectly: features checkboxes, legacy vs modern comparisons, live tests, and a complete timeline.

edge_cases.rationale: Exceptional. Protects each live test button call with detailed API-presence checking and error catching, explaining exactly why top-level invocations reject.

references.rationale: Provides direct links to target ChromeStatus entries, MDN reference pages, and CHIPS specification documentation.

design_system.rationale: Fully compliant with colors, layout grid margins, crumbs, and list markers.

summary: An outstanding, interactive migration guide that is completely compliant with all repository rubrics and rules. By offering stepper sub-panels, custom scenario selector toggles, and try-catch protected live execution tests of modern vs deprecated Storage Access API endpoints, it serves as a gold standard showcase.
